title: Summary: Turn 27
content: `processPepeSessionSnapshot` in `pepe-worker-process.ts` summarizes and ranks memories: it checks existing summaries via `shouldSummarizeMemory`, then uses `semanticClient` and `embeddingClient` to batch embed user input and summarized memory, ranking with `rankMemoryCandidatesWithVectors` and applying overrides, returning session details, summaries, candidates, and timestamps.
